title: TA Operator Class 1 — DSAT Training Course
description: DSAT-compliant training course for TA Operator Class 1 covering 4 duties and 109 tasks. Generated by NOVA™ in accordance with JSP 822 V8.0 / DTSM V2.0 Ch 1-8 (2024 Edition).
body:
This course delivers the formal training requirement for the role of TA Operator Class 1 as defined in the Role Performance Statement.

The course comprises 109 Training Objectives, 338 Enabling Objectives, and 1210 Key Learning Points, followed by a formal assessment.

Estimated duration: 273.75 hours (8 training week(s))

_bookmarking.title: Resume
_bookmarking.body: Would you like to continue where you left off?
